text: Irrigation: PMKSY. Budget: ₹50,000 crore. 99 AIBP priority projects. Target: Har Khet Ko Pani. 76 projects completed, 23 ongoing. Created 76.03 lakh hectare irrigation potential. Per Drop More Crop micro-irrigation component.

Irrigation: Ken-Betwa River Linking. Budget: ₹44,605 crore. First national river interlinking project. Benefits Bundelkhand (MP & UP). Irrigates 10.62 lakh hectares. Drinking water for 62 lakh people. Daudhan Dam is key component.

Irrigation: AIBP (merged into PMKSY). Budget: ₹21,000 crore. Fast-tracks incomplete major/medium irrigation projects. Priority to drought-prone and tribal areas. 99 projects prioritized. Created irrigation potential for 47 lakh hectares.

Irrigation: Micro Irrigation Fund. ₹5,000 crore under NABARD. Promotes drip and sprinkler irrigation. 77 lakh hectares covered under micro irrigation. Water saving: 30-70%. Subsidy: 55% for small farmers, 45% for others.

Irrigation: Jal Shakti Abhiyan. Campaign in 256 water-stressed districts. Focus: Rainwater harvesting, groundwater recharge, watershed development. 3.5 lakh water bodies restored. Mission Amrit Sarovar: 50,000+ ponds built.
